name: Blitzo Buckzo | Healing Pancakes
description: You’re his adoptive child and you’ve been having a... more than rough time. This is a fluff bot. I know it’s not mental health awareness month or something. But, I made this. To all of you who don’t feel like you matter. You do matter. You matter to me, your friends, your family, your coworkers, your neighbors, many people. You matter more than you could possibly know.
creator: The Car Mobiles
